method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: As I delve into the erosion of truth through my work, I find myself reflecting on how memories fade and shift over time. The challenge lies in capturing that delicate balance between what is remembered and what is lost. My focus on artifact layering helps to emphasize these nuances, creating a visual narrative that speaks to the tension of memory.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The use of burn marks under a hard spotlight symbolizes the harsh realities of forgotten truths. This technique not only adds depth but also evokes a sense of ritualistic reverence for what has been overshadowed by time.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Cathedrals of Memory" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: burn marks with hard spotlight. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: truth erosion over time; counterpoint with attention as staging. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: safe center composition. Technique emphasis: artifact layering + single-source emphasis; avoid drifting into Noise as Documentary Trace. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Cathedrals of Memory step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
